hero.max_rank_skill_tips_translated: Active Elevation: Upgrades Synergy damage to Ultra-Synergy damage.
hero.max_rank_skill_desc_translated: *Ultra-Synergy: PEN Rate becomes 2x during this skill’s duration and increases damage dealt this time by 6% per Formation on allies, up to 48%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_ActiveSkill_lv1
skills.desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage equal to #Factor_1# of ATK to all enemies.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Deals #Entry_1# damage equal to #Factor_1# of ATK to all enemies.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Synergy: PEN Rate becomes 1.5x during this skill’s duration and increases damage dealt this time by 4% per Formation on allies, up to 32%.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Ultra-Synergy: PEN Rate becomes 2x during this skill’s duration and increases damage dealt this time by 6% per Formation on allies, up to 48%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1121_p1
skills.desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] In Blockade Breakthrough, increases allies' basic stats by 20% and advanced stats by 15%. Stats of all allies cannot be reduced below the base value. When your turn starts, removes all buffs and stances of enemies.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] In Blockade Breakthrough, increases allies' basic stats by 20% and advanced stats by 15%. Stats of all allies cannot be reduced below the base value. When your turn starts, removes all buffs and stances of enemies.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1121_p2
skills.desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] In Blockade Breakthrough, when battle and your turn starts, grants 1 stack of #Entry_1# to all allies, up to 2 stacks. After an enemy casts skills, for every 4 stacks of Formation on allies, reduces all enemies' ATK by 15% for 1 turn, up to 5 stacks.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] In Blockade Breakthrough, when battle and your turn starts, grants 1 stack of #Entry_1# to all allies, up to 2 stacks. After an enemy casts skills, for every 4 stacks of Formation on allies, reduces all enemies' ATK by 15% for 1 turn, up to 5 stacks.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Formation: Increases all stats by 6% and active skill damage by 15%.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Formation: Increases all stats by 6% and active skill damage by 15%.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1121_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] During Blockade Breakthrough, when the battle starts, all allies recover to full HP, ignoring HP loss from the previous battle. Additionally, all allies will have their HP fixed at 1 when taking fatal damage for 1 turn.Grant Shield of 50% of the damage taken when your Character takes damage.When allied characters attack with an active skill, deals extra damage equal to 15% of the target’s Max HP, capped at 200% the attacker’s ATK.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] During Blockade Breakthrough, when the battle starts, all allies recover to full HP, ignoring HP loss from the previous battle. Additionally, all allies will have their HP fixed at 1 when taking fatal damage for 1 turn.Grant Shield of 50% of the damage taken when your Character takes damage.When allied characters attack with an active skill, deals extra damage equal to 15% of the target’s Max HP, capped at 200% the attacker’s ATK.

skills.name: tid#SkillName_burst_1
skills.desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst grants all allied characters damage dealt by 8% for 1 turn
skills.max_desc_short_translated: Gaining Power Burst grants all allied characters damage dealt by 8% for 1 turn

skills.name: tid#SkillName_1121_p3
skills.desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] During Blockade Breakthrough, when the battle starts, all allies recover to full HP, ignoring HP loss from the previous battle. Additionally, all allies will have their HP fixed at 1 when taking fatal damage for 1 turn.Grant Shield of 50% of the damage taken when your Character takes damage.When allied characters attack with an active skill, deals extra damage equal to 15% of the target’s Max HP, capped at 200% the attacker’s ATK. If the skill is single-target, deals #Entry_1# damage instead.
skills.max_desc_short_translated: [Effective also in back-up state] During Blockade Breakthrough, when the battle starts, all allies recover to full HP, ignoring HP loss from the previous battle. Additionally, all allies will have their HP fixed at 1 when taking fatal damage for 1 turn.Grant Shield of 50% of the damage taken when your Character takes damage.When allied characters attack with an active skill, deals extra damage equal to 15% of the target’s Max HP, capped at 200% the attacker’s ATK. If the skill is single-target, deals #Entry_1# damage instead.
skills.entry_desc_translated: *Ultra-Splash: 15% of this damage dealt is additionally given to all enemies.
skills.r_max_entry_desc_translated: *Ultra-Splash: 15% of this damage dealt is additionally given to all enemies.
